safeCourtLine: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that co-defendant interview material is segregated and target defendant interview summary/audio remain outstanding.
safePositionToday: The defence asks the court to record per MG6C that co-defendant interview material is segregated and target defendant interview summary/audio remain outstanding.
